creator: hf@spg.tu-darmstadt.de
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #5)
I didn't say anything about the port, did I?

Jaakoo is an off-and-on contributor to xemacs development, so he would be competent to revive the port; I guess he wasn't too happy about the eight months reaction time.

CVE-2005-0100 btw. has been fixed so long ago (24.4.17, according to <https://vulners.com/nessus/FEDORA_2005-146.NASL>) that it is hard to find references on the web.
